## What changed

- Describe the change briefly
- Explain the user impact or motivation

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npx pnpm test`
- [ ] I ran `npx pnpm validate:workspace`
- [ ] I updated `README.md` for new or changed skills
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] I added tests for non-trivial script behavior
- [ ] I did not commit local junk, generated scratch output, or unrelated files
